titleStmt.title: SII 28.254: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 254. (A.R. No. 408 of 1913.) ĀṞAGAḶŪR, ATTUR TALUK, SALEM DISTRICT.

summary.p: Kāmēśvara temple, central shrine, north wall.

p.hi: Kumāra-Vīra-Narasiṁha bhujabala-Vasantarāyar Śaka 1430, Vibhava, Kumbha śu. 7, Friday, Aśvati = 1509 A.D., January 26, f.d.t. .50

summary.p: This record is a peculiar one in so far as the mention of the ruler is concerned. First the name of Vīra-pratāpa-dēvarāyar is given. He is given the usual Vijayanagara titles and is stated to have levied tribute from Śrī-lankā (Īḻam) and to have witnessed the elephant-hunt. Then Kaṭṭāri-Sāḷuva-Narasiṁha-rāyar and his son, Tammarāyar-Narasā-nāyyakka-uḍaiyar are mentioned. Finally his son Vīra-Narasiṁha, Bhujabala-Vasantarāyar is stated to have been ruling the earth.

His local subordinate was Tulukkaṇa-ṉāyakkar, son of Eṟamañchi Timmayanāyakkar, who had a string of titles, of which Vēṅgi-nārāyaṇan, Maṟai-pukkārkāvalan (protector of brahmins) Chēra-Chōḻa-pāṉḍiya-vallāḷarāya-bhayaṅgaran, Yādava-rāya-sthāpaṉāchāriyaṉ, Śambhura-rāya-chavuttāṅkavayiri are significant.

He found that there was no chariot (tiru-ttēr) and no chariot-festival for God Tirukkāmīchuram-uḍaiya-tambirāṉār of Āṟagaḷūr in Āṟṟūṟ-kūṟṟam in Magada-maṇḍalam in Malāḍu alias Jananātha-vaḷanāḍu and consequently had chariot-festival to be celebrated in the month of Māśi. The continuation of the inscription giving further details have been lost.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrīman mahāmaṇḍaleśva
ran hariyarāya vibhāṭan bhā
ṣaikku tappuvarāyar kaṇṭaṉ mūva
rāyar kaṇṭaṉ kaṇṭanāṭu koṇṭu koṇṭanāṭu
koṭātāṉ pūrvvadakṣaṇapaścimauttara
catusamudrādipati Īḻantiṟai koṇṭu gajave
ṭṭai kaṇṭaruḷiya rājādhirājan Irāja parameśvaran
śrīvīrapratāpatevarāyar mahārāyar metinimīśvarakaṇṭaṉ
kaṭṭāri cāḷuvaṉ naraciṅkarāyar kumāra tammarāyar narasānā
yakka Uṭaiyār śrīmatkumāra vīranarasiṁha bhujabala vasa
ndarāyar pridhivirājyam paṇṇi Aruḷā niṉṟa cakāptam
1000 4 100 3 10 Itaṉmel cellā niṉṟa vibhava samvatsara
ttu kumbha nāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu saptamiyum śukravāramu
m Aśvati śubhayogamum peṟṟa nāḷ malāṭākiya jananā
ta vaḷanāṭṭu makatamaṇṭalattu Āṟṟūṟ kūṟṟattu Āṟa
kaḷūr nayiṉār tirukkāmīcuramuṭaiya tampirāṉāṟku śrīman ma
hānāyaṅkācāriyan bhāṣaikku tappuvanayaṅkara kaṇ
ṭaṉ naraḷo kaṇṭaṉ vaṅkiṉārāyaṇaṉ maṟaipukkār
kāvalaṉ cera coḻa pāṇṭiya vallāḷarāya payaṅkaran
yātavarāya sthāpaṉācāriyaṉ campuvarāya cavuttāṅka vayiri
�ṭikkāṟar kaṇṭaṉ śrīmatu Eṟamāñci timmaya nāyakkar
śrīmat kumārar tulukkaṇa ṉāyakkar tirukkāmīcuramuṭaiya ta
mpirāṉāṟku pāṇṭiyaṉ nāḷ mutal Iṉṉāḷ varaikku ti
rutter Illāmal Irukkail naraḷoka kaṇṭaṉ ti
rutterum camaittu māci māsattu pūrvvapakṣattu tuśuddhādiśi
yile tirukkoṭi Eṟa Āyiliyatkile Āṟai
ṉāyakar tirutterile Eḻuntaruḷa tirutterum OṭṭavittuContinuation lost.
Digital edition of SII 28.254 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
